description: Bayer announced a $66 billion bid for Monsanto in May 2016 to create a global agricultural giant. The merger faced immense public outcry across Europe and the US regarding GMO safety, environmental impact, and market consolidation.

key_events.description: Public protests erupt in Berlin and St. Louis against the consolidation of chemical power.
Environmental groups release reports on the long-term impact on global seed diversity.
US and EU regulators express deep skepticism over the market dominance of the new entity.

calibration_notes: Demonstrates the volatility of public opinion when corporate brands carry high existing negative sentiment.
